phase3_findings.description: devflow-runner.yml empty-read settings classification comments misdescribe the branch: a 0-byte present base-ref settings.json makes git show exit 0 -> classified 'ok', not 'degraded'; the git cat-file -e branch is only reached on git-show FAILURE.

Write-tier partial-vendor skew (HELPER present, describe-plugin-compose.sh absent) with valid extras: the extras are composed unconditionally into the credentialed runner's plugin surface but neither annotation arm fires, so they splice with NO ::notice:: audit line, violating docs/cloud-setup.md's 'never silent' guarantee.

Inline dedupe()/join/rank-selection composing bash in the three workflows is grep-pinned only, not behaviorally driven. Consistent with the repo's existing inline-glue posture (extracted arm-selection helper IS tested); dedupe verified correct by two other reviewers.
`|| true` on the always-exit-0 helper invocation could mask an unexpected non-zero crash (bash-level breakage before python emits stderr) into a silent baseline. Narrow exposure.

fix_decisions.claim_text: empty-read settings classification comment misdescribes the branch
fix_decisions.evidence: comment-analyzer graded Critical; observable fail-direction is SAFE (0-byte present file -> git show exit 0 -> 'ok' -> helper flags invalid JSON downstream -> degraded warning; fails closed to baseline), suite green. Impact is maintainer-misleading in security-sensitive trusted-materialization prose, not a runtime misbehavior -> Important, applied.

fix_decisions.claim_text: extract inline dedupe/join/rank into a driven scripts/*.sh
fix_decisions.evidence: single-source (pr-test-analyzer, an empirical over-grader); two other reviewers (final-pass, code-reviewer) explicitly judged the inline-glue-grep-pinned posture consistent with the repo's established #404/#458 inline-rank posture and verified dedupe correct. Legitimate improvement, not a blocking defect.

fix_decisions.claim_text: || true masks unexpected non-zero helper crash
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion severity, narrow exposure (crash before python emits stderr); helper is contractually exit-0.

stale_prose_check: rc=0, no STALE rows (all UNRESOLVABLE 'three call sites' recognition-only + VERIFIED); no stale prose introduced by the fix delta

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty at run time (grades committed HEAD); self-skips pre-commit. Re-checked post-commit via scripts/stale-prose-lint.py on the branch diff (rc=0, no STALE) and runs live on CI with full history.

sweep_evidence.reason: fixes are comment corrections + one shell annotation arm + a grep-pin; §2.3 authoring sweeps re-anchored: coupled-prose (§2.3.0) applied inline (the reworded runner comment was checked against its code; the splice-notice arm mirrors describe-plugin-compose.sh's text); no other sweep trigger matched the delta
